hero.title: Master Python Backend
hero.description: Learn how to build powerful backend systems using Python with frameworks like Flask and Django, including APIs, databases, and real-world applications.

python basics.description: Learn Python fundamentals including syntax, data types, functions, and modules.

backend fundamentals.description: Understand how backend systems work including HTTP, servers, and request-response cycle.

flask framework.description: Build lightweight backend APIs using Flask with routing and middleware.

django framework.description: Develop full-featured backend applications using Django with ORM and admin panel.

api development.description: Create RESTful APIs, handle requests, responses, and validation.

database integration.description: Work with SQL/NoSQL databases, ORM, migrations, and queries.

authentication & security.description: Implement authentication, JWT, OAuth, and secure backend systems.

deployment & scaling.description: Deploy backend apps using Docker, cloud platforms, and scaling strategies.

seo.title: About This Python Backend Tutorial Series
seo.description: Python backend development focuses on building server-side applications, APIs, and scalable systems. This tutorial series covers Python fundamentals, Flask, Django, database integration, authentication, and deployment strategies for real-world applications.
